articles.title: Here are the big stories from Karnataka today
articles.description: Welcome to the Karnataka Today newsletter, your guide from The Hindu on the major news stories to follow today. Curated and written by Nalme Nachiyar.

articles.title: US strikes Iran, South Korea learns a tough lesson on THAAD gamble
articles.description: US strikes Iran South Korea learns a tough lesson on THAAD gamble

articles.title: Animal Husbandry department launches digital platform for livestock and pet trading
articles.description: The objective is to benefit both farmers and traders by overcoming the limitations of traditional market systems

articles.title: Opposition’s no-confidence motion against Speaker Om Birla dimissed in Lok Sabha
articles.description: Opposition’s no-confidence motion against Speaker Om Birla dimissed in Lok Sabha

articles.title: District administration gears up for Gooty Fort festival on March 14 and 15
Non-Hindus to be barred from entering Badrinath, Kedarnath from this year: Report
articles.description: As the Char Dham Yatra approaches, significant changes are announced: Non-Hindus will be barred from entering the sacred Badrinath and Kedarnath shrines. This decision, rooted in tradition, reflects the temples' status as centers of faith rather than tourist destinations.

articles.title: TikTok now lets Apple Music subscribers play full songs without leaving the app
articles.description: TikTok, which is known for shaping music trends and viral songs, said the new feature is designed to make it easier to go from the moment of discovery to deeper listening.

articles.title: Governor Ravi bids farewell to Tamil Nadu; State Cabinet stays away
articles.description: Kerala Governor Rajendra Vishwanath Arlekar, who has been appointed to additionally discharge functions of Tamil Nadu Governor, is set to assume office at the Lok Bhavan in Chennai on March 12

articles.title: Class 10 public exams begin with language paper in Tamil Nadu
articles.description: The first paper saw 11,898 absentees, including 10,877 school students and 1,021 private candidates.

articles.title: Van crash at White House gate prompts road closures in DC; driver detained, no injuries reported
articles.description: The incident comes just days after two alleged ISIS terrorists hurled improvised explosive devices at a protest outside the New York mayor’s mansion.

articles.title: Google completes $32B acquisition of Wiz
articles.description: Google has officially acquired Israeli cybersecurity firm Wiz for $32 billion in all-cash, a full year after the companies announced the deal. This marks Google's biggest acquisition in its history.

articles.title: Watch: Supreme Court allows passive euthanasia for man in coma for over 12 years
US-Israel-Iran conflict: Will Trump administration change its West Asia military strategy amid rising oil prices?
articles.description: US officials believe the country can withstand a short-term spike in oil prices for up to four weeks. The White House calls the rise a temporary disruption and is taking steps to stabilise markets.

articles.title: Opposition's no-trust motion against Speaker defeated in Lok Sabha amid uproar
articles.description: Oppositions notrust motion against Speaker defeated in Lok Sabha amid uproar

articles.title: Karnataka police tackle Kerala lottery sales in Mysuru-Chamarajanagar border areas
articles.description: The district police say they registered two cases on March 9 against persons illegally selling Kerala State lottery tickets in Yelandur town

articles.title: Van drives through barricade outside White House, driver detained: Local media
articles.description: Van drives through barricade outside White House driver detained Local media

articles.title: Three assailants assault two Jewish men in San Jose; police probe antisemitic hate crime
articles.description: A violent incident in San Jose involved three assailants attacking two Jewish men after overhearing them speak Hebrew. The assault, which included antisemitic slurs, is being investigated as a hate crime. Local officials condemned the attack and emphasized the need for accountability.

articles.title: Two Indians killed, one missing after attacks on merchant vessels amid West Asia conflict: MEA
articles.description: Two Indians killed, one missing after attacks on merchant vessels amid West Asia conflict: MEA

articles.title: CEO offers  ₹28 LPA, candidate accepts; then asks  ₹36 LPA days before joining. Internet calls it 'calculative and smart'
articles.description: A post by KnotDating co-founder and CEO Jasveer Singh about a job candidate renegotiating salary just days before joining has gone viral on X, sparking a heated debate online about hiring practices, salary negotiations and “offer shopping” in the tech industry.

articles.title: "You Wink, Blow Kisses": Amit Shah Counters Rahul Gandhi On Speaker's Conduct
"Won't Desert Citizens During Trouble": PM Modi On Indians Stranded In Gulf
articles.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi said today that no Indian will be left behind in war-torn middle east.

articles.title: First Iraq footballers granted visas by Mexico for FIFA World Cup qualifier
articles.description: Mexico issues visas to some Iraq footballers so they can play in FIFA World Cup 2026 qualifier in Monterrey.

articles.title: 10 Maoist cadres, including leader with  ₹55 lakh bounty, surrender in Odisha
articles.description: Ten Maoist cadres, including a  ₹55 lakh bounty leader from Chhattisgarh, surrender before Kandhamal Police in Odisha with firearms and ammunition

articles.title: NH-66 works near completion in Kannur and Kasaragod; target set before monsoon
articles.description: Key works are progressing on the Cherkala-Nileshwaram and Nileshwaram-Taliparamba reaches of the highway

articles.title: Van Smashes Into Security Barricade Near White House
articles.description: A van slammed into a security barricade near the White House early Wednesday, police said, triggering a full lockdown of downtown Washington.

articles.title: Protestors in Manipur demand NRC before Census, tear-gassed
articles.description: Scores of people, mostly women, say the State needs a mechanism to weed out ‘illegal immigrants’

articles.title: How Visceral Fat Is Increasing Kidney Risks In Normal-Weight Indian
articles.description: Clinicians now see a new trend where people with normal body weight develop metabolic diseases through their hidden visceral fat accumulation.

articles.title: Drunken boast at dhaba exposes eight-month-old murder in Nagpur - The Indian Express
articles.description: Drunken boast at dhaba exposes eight-month-old murder in Nagpur  The Indian Express

articles.title: Two Indians killed, one missing after merchant vessels came under attack during Middle East war: Government
articles.description: Two Indians killed one missing after merchant vessels came under attack during Middle East war Government

articles.title: Hansika Motwani Divorce: How Much Alimony Will The Actress Get From Sohael Khaturiya?
articles.description: Hansika Motwani began her career as a child artist with the TV show, Shaka Laka Boom Boom. She later appeared in the serial, Des Mein Niklla Hoga Chand. She was also part of Hrithik Roshan's Koi......

articles.title: Xiaomi 17 Ultra's Camera Is A Photographer's Bliss
articles.description: The Xiaomi 17 Ultra includes a massive 1-inch Light Fusion 1050L sensor.

articles.title: From covid tracker to health vault: Aarogya Setu set for reboot
articles.description: The relaunch aims to move Aarogya Setu away from being a covid-era tracking tool and position it as a supplement to India’s digital health infrastructure. It involves a complete overhaul of the app’s core functionality, with the contact-tracing feature permanently discontinued.

articles.title: Opinion: Nitish Kumar And The Great Bihar Promise That Never Came
articles.description: Nitish Kumar had the chance to transform Bihar. He had built enough political equity and developed administrative chops to bring about real change. Yet, he did not.

articles.title: Railway police teams nab laptop thief
IPL 2026 Schedule Released: RCB To Face SRH In Tournament Opener On March 28
articles.description: The BCCI have adopted a staggered fixtures release strategy, to allow the board to adjust later match windows around the schedule for upcoming state elections in several parts of India.

articles.title: Loud Blasts Heard In Dubai As Drones Fall Near Airport; UAE Shuts Major Refinery
articles.description: Four people, including an Indian national, were injured after two drones fell near Dubai International Airport (DXB), the Dubai Media Office said.

articles.title: LPG shortage crisis: Karnataka Assembly witnesses uproar as Congress and BJP trade barbs
articles.description: Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah blamed Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s weak foreign policy, triggering protests from BJP members

articles.title: Stalin requests Union government to revisit methodology to supply adequate gas to meet power demand
articles.description: CM has written to Union Minister for Petroleum and Natural Gas Hardeep Singh Puri regarding the natural gas allocation to power plants

articles.title: Hansika Motwani And Sohael Khaturiya: A Relationship Timeline
articles.description: Neither Hansika nor Sohael has publicly commented on the divorce yet

articles.title: UK home secretary bans al-Quds march in London after Met Police request
articles.description: The police requested the ban citing public disorder risks, while the organisers decide to hold a static protest instead.

articles.title: ‘Siren economy’: Why tactical wins fail to bring Israel strategic safety
articles.description: Analyst refers to 'security achievement gap' of tactical assassinations that fail to bring Israel security.

articles.title: Archaeological exploration along Pambai river in Villupuram yields Iron Age cultural materials
articles.description: Surface-level field investigations have yielded significant finds such as Iron Age urn burials, potsherds, glass beads, ring wells and ceramics, indicating the potential for full-scale excavations in the region

articles.title: Al Jazeera visits Middle East’s first women-only mosque
articles.description: Al Jazeera visited the first women-only mosque in the Middle East, in the Qatari capital Doha.

articles.title: 43 New Medical Colleges Added; 11,682 MBBS, 8,967 PG Seats Approved
articles.description: Medical Education Update: The PG seat count includes seats in institutions such as All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS) and other Institutes of National Importance (INIs).

articles.title: Woman Test Driving Tata Sierra Plunges Into Construction Pit - Did 5 Star Safety Help?
articles.description: The Tata Sierra plunged into a construction pit with three occupants onboard during a test drive after the driver lost control.

articles.title: 5 Regular Screenings That Can Help Evaluate Your Heart's Health
articles.description: Regular screenings are one of the effective tools that can help assess heart health and identify major risk factors early on.

articles.title: Induction cooktops going out of stock across India amid LPG crisis
articles.description: Induction cooktops going out of stock across India amid LPG crisis

articles.title: Box Office Collection Day 13: Kerala Story 2 Struggles; Thaai Kizhavi Crosses Rs 45 Crore
articles.description: Thaai Kizhavi is reportedly a super hit after collecting almost 4 times its budget.

articles.title: 108 Maoists surrender in Chhattisgarh's Bastar;  ₹3.61 crore cash, gold recovered
articles.description: The development comes as Union Home Minister Amit Shah has set March 31, 2026, as the target date for completely eliminating Naxalism from the country.

articles.title: Startup Co-Founder Raises Rs 1.9 Crore After X Post Goes Viral
articles.description: Up and Run co-founder Chanakya Shah revealed that a single post on X (social media platform) helped the startup secure about Rs 1.9 crore in funding.

articles.title: Lowered foundation of our democracy deeper than 'paatal': Amit Shah on no-trust motion against Speaker
articles.description: Lowered foundation of our democracy deeper than paatal Amit Shah on notrust motion against Speaker

articles.title: Gas Crunch: 47.4 Mmscmd Of Supply Hit, Govt Admits; Says Two LNG Cargoes On Way
articles.description: India's per day gas consumption stands at around 189 Mmsmd, officials said.

articles.title: 100 Indian Students To Return From Iran Via Armenia Route
articles.description: Amid escalating Israel-Iran tensions, around 100 Indian students stranded in Iran are expected to return to India on March 14 and 15 via commercial flights after travelling to Armenia by road.

articles.title: NTA Likely To Publish CUET UG 2026 Date Sheet This Week At Official Website
articles.description: Based on previous year patterns, the agency is likely to publish the schedule within this week. The timetable will be available on the official website at cuet.nta.nic.in.

articles.title: Meghalaya board postpones two Class 12 exams in violence-hit West Garo Hills
articles.description: The examinations in remaining districts of the state will continue as per schedule, said an official.

articles.title: G7 welcomes potential record release of oil reserves in bid to curb soaring prices
articles.description: The group of nations welcomes the idea of releasing oil in response to the surge in prices since the US-Israel war with Iran began

articles.title: Instagram Down: Social Media Users Joke, Spark Meme Fest On X - 'No One's Texting'
articles.description: Users took to other social media platforms such as Threads and 'X' to post about how they have been dealing with the outage.

articles.title: Panic-buying, hoarding of gas cylinders due to misinformation: Centre says more LPG procured amid shortage
articles.description: Panicbuying hoarding of gas cylinders due to misinformation Centre says more LPG procured amid shortage

articles.title: Mardaani 3 On OTT: When, Where To Watch Rani Mukerji's Crime Thriller Online?
articles.description: During its theatrical run, the film collected around Rs 50 crore net in India and approximately Rs 60 crore gross worldwide so far.

articles.title: INR weakens as local equities tank - Business Standard
articles.description: INR weakens as local equities tank  Business Standard

articles.title: Ukraine records first territorial gains since 2023 amid Russian army woes
articles.description: As Kyiv liberates parts of Dnipropetrovsk and Zaporizhia, Zelenskyy says Russia losing up to 35,000 soldiers a month.

articles.title: Zoox plans to put its robotaxis on the Uber app in Vegas this year
articles.description: The purpose-built robotaxis will be available on Uber's app in Las Vegas this year, and Los Angeles next year, if Zoox gets the federal approval it's been seeking.

articles.title: Rural tap water connections rose from 17% to 82% since launch of Jal Jeevan Mission: President
articles.description: Addressing the Jal Mahotsav programme, the President said water is not merely a basic facility in India but is deeply connected to the country’s culture, traditions, livelihoods and community life

articles.title: Which countries have seen the highest petrol prices since the Iran war?
articles.description: At least 85 countries have reported petrol price rises since the attacks on Iran by the US and Israel on February 28.

articles.title: US once rejected Ukraine's anti-Shahed drone tech: How the 'tactical error' is costing Trump govt dear amid Iran war
articles.description: In August 2025, Zelenskyy offered Trump Ukraine’s proven anti-Shahed drone tech, including low-cost interceptors and combat hubs, but the US dismissed it. After Iran’s drone attacks escalated in 2026, the US reversed course, requesting Ukraine’s help to protect bases in the Middle East.

articles.title: 'Don't panic, please': Govt to consumers panic booking LPG cylinders fearing shortage
articles.description: The government assured that adequate LPG stocks are available and asked people to avoid unnecessary bookings.

articles.title: 90% of India's LPG imports travels through Hormuz Strait, but things in control: Govt
articles.description: 90% of India's LPG imports travels through Strait of Hormuz, but things in control: Govt

articles.title: Mamata Banerjee targets PM Modi over LPG price rise, announces rally in Kolkata
articles.description: West Bengal CM Mamata Banerjee targets PM Modi over LPG price hike and shortage, announces Trinamool Congress (TMC) rally in Kolkata on March 16

articles.title: Used phone buyers urged to check sale of blacklisted products
articles.description: Kozhikode city police trace 124 lost or stolen phones blacklisted on Sanchar Saathi portal and distribute it to the original owners

articles.title: Asia’s largest Tulip Garden to open in Srinagar on March 16: Ticket price, timings, what to expect
articles.description: Srinagar’s iconic Indira Gandhi Memorial Tulip Garden will open to visitors from March 16 this year. Spread across the Zabarwan foothills and overlooking Dal Lake, the garden will showcase nearly 1.8 million tulips in more than 70 varieties.

articles.title: Iran security chief warns against anti-government protests
articles.description: Anti-government protesters will be treated as an “enemy” as US-Israeli attacks continue, says Iran’s security chief.

articles.title: From Thailand to Pakistan, these countries are asking people to work from home to deal with fuel crisis
articles.description: The fuel crisis stemming from the US-Iran conflict is leading countries to adopt work-from-home policies again. Governments, including Thailand and Pakistan, are implementing strategies to conserve fuel and mitigate disruptions caused by rising oil prices and shipping challenges.

articles.title: How much a day of war on Iran costs the US
articles.description: The US spent $3.7 billion in the first four days of bombing Iran. Here’s the bill.

articles.title: India's crude oil supply secure: Centre amid shortage fears due to Strait of Hormuz closure
articles.description: India's crude oil supply secure: Centre amid shortage fears due to Strait of Hormuz closure

articles.title: 12 days: How 2025 Iran blueprint trapped US, Israel in longer war
articles.description: Unlike the truce from last year's 12-day war, "decapitation" strikes have locked US and Israel in a war of attrition.

articles.title: Over 93,000 posts vacant in CAPFs: govt. tells Rajya Sabha
articles.description: The Central Industrial Security Force (CISF) has the highest number of 28,342 vacant posts followed by the Central Reserve Police Force (CRPF) with 27,400 vacancies; MoS Home says govt. has reduced the time taken for medical examinations and lowered cut-off marks for shortlisting candidates in categories facing shortfalls to ensure adequate recruitment

articles.title: UP Police recover over 500 stolen LPG cylinders in Jhansi, arrest 7
articles.description: The police also recovered ₹11.10 lakh in cash and ₹83,820 believed to be proceeds from the sale of cylinders, from their possession, he said

articles.title: 4 day week, fewer car trips in Philippines as Iran fallout bites
articles.description: Rising fuel prices are pushing more people to use public transport and prompting a four-day work week in Manila.

articles.title: LPG shortage from West Asia conflict may force IRCTC to suspend cooked meals on trains: Report
articles.description: The IRCTC is mulling temporary suspension of the cooked meal services on the trains for its passengers. The Railways, as per the report, may also issue refunds to the passengers who had booked meals while during their reservations.

articles.title: Rajasthan shocker: Class 11 student hit with iron rods, stabbed to death after dispute over social media reels
articles.description: In a chilling incident in Kota, Rajasthan, a 17-year-old boy was murdered by two to three miscreants following a suspected dispute linked to social media reels.

articles.title: No proposal for Front-of-Pack Labelling awareness campaign: Govt tells RS
articles.description: No proposal for Front-of-Pack Labelling awareness campaign: Govt tells RS

articles.title: Uttam Nagar Holi clash: Delhi HC stays MCD demolition for a week
articles.description: Court allows residents to file fresh petitions as civic body says action targeted encroachments, not specific individuals

articles.title: Census 2027 to also include transgender-headed households, Rajya Sabha told
articles.description: Nityanand Rai said enumerators shall undertake house-to-house field visits in the entire enumeration area for the collection of Census data to avoid any exclusion on any ground

articles.title: Memes galore over Pakistan’s fuel-saving curbs, netizens mock govt: 'Sab band kar diya chacha'
articles.description: Pakistan announced fuel-saving measures amid fears of oil supply disruptions linked to the West Asia crisis; however, the measures have evoked humorous responses on social media.

articles.title: God is great. So is the other God. Also, the other one
articles.description: God is great So is the other God Also the other one

articles.title: Ukraine says it has hit Russian 'missile component' plant
articles.description: Russia says the attack hit civilians and could not have been carried out without British help.

articles.title: Kerosene bombs hurled at MP Karti Chidambaram’s office in Karaikudi
UN aid worker killed in DR Congo’s rebel-held Goma
articles.description: France's president said a French aid worker with UNICEF was killed, after M23 rebels said 'combat drone' hit the city.

articles.title: Iranian female footballer changes mind on Australian asylum offer
articles.description: One member of the Iranian women’s football team offered asylum by Australia has decided to return home to Iran.

articles.title: Manipur: Six injured in protest against census without NRC
articles.description: Hundreds took to the streets under the banner of Just Fair Delimitation (JFD), a civil body, and marched towards the Manipur assembly

articles.title: RERA tribunal upholds description of BDA as a ‘promoter’, crucial win for allottees of sites in Bengaluru
articles.description: BDA had submitted that site allotments are contractual in nature and governed by the BDA (Allotment of Site) Rules, 1984, and that disputes should be adjudicated under those rules

articles.title: Only words Birla ji has for us, 'No, No, No': Opposition MPs
articles.description: Only words Birla ji has for us, 'No, No, No': Opposition MPs

articles.title: PM hails Dheevara Sabha’s 50-year journey, promises prosperity for Kerala households
articles.description: Official recognition of ‘Keralam’ reflects Malayali cultural identity, says Modi

articles.title: Iran declares US-Israeli economic, banking interests in region are targets
articles.description: IRGC releases a list of offices run by top US companies with Israeli links whose technology has been used militarily.

articles.title: Coimbatore’s e-learning initiative on marine life
articles.description: An e-learning opportunity that connects classrooms with the wonders and challenges of marine life and its conservation

articles.title: Thai cargo ship enroute to Gujarat port hit by 2 projectiles near Strait of Hormuz, 20 crew members rescued
articles.description: Thai cargo ship enroute to Gujarat port hit by  projectiles near Strait of Hormuz  crew members rescued

articles.title: LPG shortage fears grow amid Strait of Hormuz closure: How cylinders reach your doorstep
articles.description: Fears of LPG shortage amid supply disruptions due to Iran-US war has led to black market sales, panic buying and prompted government action.

articles.title: PIL in Madras High Court seeks SOP to ensure Chennai civic bodies work in tandem while digging up roads
articles.description: Chief Justice Sushrut Arvind Dharmadhikari and Justice G. Arul Murugan order notice to all four authorities and direct them to file their counter affidavits within two weeks

articles.title: Iran reports hospitals, civilians affected during war with US, Israel
articles.description: The Iranian Red Crescent Society says nearly 20,000 civilian buildings affected, along with 77 healthcare facilities.

articles.title: Comptroller Mark Levine expresses concern over Zohran Mamdani’s budget, says “New York spending more than it takes in"
articles.description: New York City Comptroller Mark Levine raised concerns over Mayor Mamdani's budget, projecting a $7.3 billion deficit, larger than the administration's estimate. He criticized increased spending, proposed property tax hikes, and highlighted economic uncertainties, including geopolitical risks and AI.

articles.title: Arunachal governor asks tour operators to focus on sustainable tourism
articles.description: Arunachal governor asks tour operators to focus on sustainable tourism

articles.title: Iran welcome to compete in FIFA World Cup, Trump tells Infantino
articles.description: FIFA's Infantino says US president 'reiterates that the Iranian team is welcome' to participate in the tournament.

articles.title: Census 2027 to also include transgender-headed households, Rajya Sabha told
articles.description: Census 2027 to also include transgender-headed households, Rajya Sabha told

articles.title: Video shows moment Air India Express plane made hard landing on Phuket runway
articles.description: Footage from near the runway shows the aircraft during its landing roll, appearing to veer slightly as it struggles to maintain a straight line.

articles.title: 2 meals a day, no dosa-puri: Bengaluru PG body's guidelines amid LPG crunch
articles.description: meals a day no dosapuri Bengaluru PG bodys guidelines amid LPG crunch

articles.title: ‘Some problems need a human’: Founder's viral post on AI support failing at airport strikes a chord online
articles.description: Swapnil Srivastav's tweet detailing a frustrating experience with Akasa Air's AI customer support garnered significant attention. Users expressed concerns over AI's limitations in urgent situations, advocating for human interaction when resolving customer issues.

articles.title: Japan becomes first G7 country to announce release of strategic oil reserves amid Middle East crisis
articles.description: Japan becomes first G country to announce release of strategic oil reserves amid Middle East crisis

articles.title: Canadian PM Mark Carney inches closer to majority, as fourth MP defects to Liberals
articles.description: Lori Idlout, formerly of the NDP, has become the latest lawmaker in the current parliament to cross the floor.

articles.title: India’s Supreme Court allows first-ever passive euthanasia death

articles.title: New Green Express highway from Surat will reduce Delhi-Chennai distance by 320 kms: Gadkari
articles.description: New Green Express highway from Surat will reduce Delhi-Chennai distance by 320 kms: Gadkari

articles.title: PM Modi highlights Kerala’s potential in floating solar power sector to enhance clean energy and infrastructure development
articles.description: Modi says the 50-MW floating solar project for which foundation stone has been laid at West Kallada is a step towards this direction

articles.title: After ‘judiciary’ chapter row, Supreme Court orders removal of 3 NCERT members from finalising future textbooks
articles.description: A Bench led by Chief Justice Surya Kant directed the institutions to dissociate chairperson Professor Michel Danino, along with his two associates.

articles.title: CBSE rickrolled: Class 12 math paper QR code links to 1987 Rick Astley hit
articles.description: The CBSE on Tuesday moved to quash concerns about the integrity of the examination, issuing a press release confirming that the question papers were genuine

articles.description: Indias cheese story is changing and mozzarella isnt the star anymore

articles.title: LPG cylinder shortage forces Hyderabad hotels to scale down menus, possible closure clouds establishments
India allows first passive euthanasia: How Supreme Court's ruling for Harish Rana compares to laws around the world
articles.description: The Supreme Court has allowed passive euthanasia for the first time in the Harish Rana case, permitting withdrawal of life support for a 32-year-old in a vegetative state since 2013. Here is how India's law compares to euthanasia legislation across the world.

articles.title: ‘To be or not to be…’: What Supreme Court said in Harish Rana euthanasia case | Top quotes
articles.description: In a historic decision, the Supreme Court allowed passive euthanasia for Harish Rana, who has been in a vegetative state for over 13 years.

articles.title: Iran’s strategic patience tactic failed, what comes next could be far worse
articles.description: Restraint didn't prevent war; new Iranian leadership may now look to much more dangerous approach to build a deterrent.

articles.title: NCERT ‘Judiciary Corruption’ row: SC directs Centre, states to dissociate panel behind Class 8 chapter
articles.description: The three have been dissociated from preparing curriculum or finalisation of the textbook or rendering any service to the NCERT even for the next generation if that would mean a payment to them from the public funds.

articles.title: Periodic revision of guidance value essential for fair land compensation: Karnataka Minister Krishna Byre Gowda
articles.description: In some areas, the guidance value of land may be around ₹2 lakh, while the actual market value ranges between ₹70 lakh and ₹80 lakh, said the Minister

topStories.title: Van crash at White House gate prompts road closures in DC; driver detained, no injuries reported
topStories.description: The incident comes just days after two alleged ISIS terrorists hurled improvised explosive devices at a protest outside the New York mayor’s mansion.

topStories.title: Watch: Supreme Court allows passive euthanasia for man in coma for over 12 years
US-Israel-Iran conflict: Will Trump administration change its West Asia military strategy amid rising oil prices?
topStories.description: US officials believe the country can withstand a short-term spike in oil prices for up to four weeks. The White House calls the rise a temporary disruption and is taking steps to stabilise markets.

topStories.title: Van drives through barricade outside White House, driver detained: Local media
topStories.description: Van drives through barricade outside White House driver detained Local media

topStories.title: Van Smashes Into Security Barricade Near White House
topStories.description: A van slammed into a security barricade near the White House early Wednesday, police said, triggering a full lockdown of downtown Washington.

topStories.title: LPG shortage crisis: Karnataka Assembly witnesses uproar as Congress and BJP trade barbs
topStories.description: Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah blamed Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s weak foreign policy, triggering protests from BJP members

topStories.title: G7 welcomes potential record release of oil reserves in bid to curb soaring prices
topStories.description: The group of nations welcomes the idea of releasing oil in response to the surge in prices since the US-Israel war with Iran began

topStories.title: Zoox plans to put its robotaxis on the Uber app in Vegas this year
topStories.description: The purpose-built robotaxis will be available on Uber's app in Las Vegas this year, and Los Angeles next year, if Zoox gets the federal approval it's been seeking.

topStories.title: Which countries have seen the highest petrol prices since the Iran war?
topStories.description: At least 85 countries have reported petrol price rises since the attacks on Iran by the US and Israel on February 28.

topStories.title: US once rejected Ukraine's anti-Shahed drone tech: How the 'tactical error' is costing Trump govt dear amid Iran war
topStories.description: In August 2025, Zelenskyy offered Trump Ukraine’s proven anti-Shahed drone tech, including low-cost interceptors and combat hubs, but the US dismissed it. After Iran’s drone attacks escalated in 2026, the US reversed course, requesting Ukraine’s help to protect bases in the Middle East.

topStories.title: Iran security chief warns against anti-government protests
topStories.description: Anti-government protesters will be treated as an “enemy” as US-Israeli attacks continue, says Iran’s security chief.

topStories.title: From Thailand to Pakistan, these countries are asking people to work from home to deal with fuel crisis
topStories.description: The fuel crisis stemming from the US-Iran conflict is leading countries to adopt work-from-home policies again. Governments, including Thailand and Pakistan, are implementing strategies to conserve fuel and mitigate disruptions caused by rising oil prices and shipping challenges.

dailyNews.title: How much a day of war on Iran costs the US
dailyNews.description: The US spent $3.7 billion in the first four days of bombing Iran. Here’s the bill.

dailyNews.title: 12 days: How 2025 Iran blueprint trapped US, Israel in longer war
dailyNews.description: Unlike the truce from last year's 12-day war, "decapitation" strikes have locked US and Israel in a war of attrition.

dailyNews.title: UN aid worker killed in DR Congo’s rebel-held Goma
dailyNews.description: France's president said a French aid worker with UNICEF was killed, after M23 rebels said 'combat drone' hit the city.

dailyNews.title: Only words Birla ji has for us, 'No, No, No': Opposition MPs
dailyNews.description: Only words Birla ji has for us, 'No, No, No': Opposition MPs

dailyNews.title: Iran declares US-Israeli economic, banking interests in region are targets
dailyNews.description: IRGC releases a list of offices run by top US companies with Israeli links whose technology has been used militarily.

dailyNews.title: LPG shortage fears grow amid Strait of Hormuz closure: How cylinders reach your doorstep
dailyNews.description: Fears of LPG shortage amid supply disruptions due to Iran-US war has led to black market sales, panic buying and prompted government action.

dailyNews.title: Iran reports hospitals, civilians affected during war with US, Israel
dailyNews.description: The Iranian Red Crescent Society says nearly 20,000 civilian buildings affected, along with 77 healthcare facilities.

dailyNews.title: Comptroller Mark Levine expresses concern over Zohran Mamdani’s budget, says “New York spending more than it takes in"
dailyNews.description: New York City Comptroller Mark Levine raised concerns over Mayor Mamdani's budget, projecting a $7.3 billion deficit, larger than the administration's estimate. He criticized increased spending, proposed property tax hikes, and highlighted economic uncertainties, including geopolitical risks and AI.

dailyNews.title: Iran welcome to compete in FIFA World Cup, Trump tells Infantino
dailyNews.description: FIFA's Infantino says US president 'reiterates that the Iranian team is welcome' to participate in the tournament.

dailyNews.title: After ‘judiciary’ chapter row, Supreme Court orders removal of 3 NCERT members from finalising future textbooks
dailyNews.description: A Bench led by Chief Justice Surya Kant directed the institutions to dissociate chairperson Professor Michel Danino, along with his two associates.

dailyNews.title: ‘To be or not to be…’: What Supreme Court said in Harish Rana euthanasia case | Top quotes
dailyNews.description: In a historic decision, the Supreme Court allowed passive euthanasia for Harish Rana, who has been in a vegetative state for over 13 years.

dailyNews.title: Texas conservatives tout record-breaking school choice signups after long battle with teachers unions
dailyNews.description: After battling with Democrats and teacher unions, Texas conservatives are celebrating the successful launch of what is likely to become the largest school-choice program in the country.

topStories.title: Trump delivered for tipped workers. Why do Democratic governors hate them?
topStories.description: Blue-state governors resist following Trump's tax-free tips policy, leaving service workers paying state taxes while federal relief provides limited help.

topStories.title: Secret Service agents question driver of suspicious vehicle near White House
topStories.description: The driver of a suspicious vehicle near the White House was detained for questioning on Wednesday morning, the U.S. Secret Service said.

topStories.title: Joy Behar claims under Obama there was 'nothing to make fun of' for comedians
topStories.description: Joy Behar said there was nothing for comedians to make fun of under former President Barack Obama's administration on her "The View" podcast Tuesday.

topStories.title: Valerie Jarrett earned $740K as Obama insiders filled top roles during $850M presidential center build
topStories.description: Former Obama White House officials command high salaries at Obama Foundation as executive payroll hits $43.7 million, with CEO Valerie Jarrett earning $740,000.

topStories.description: Trump nominee Jeremy Carl withdraws from State Department role after facing bipartisan criticism over past controversial race and Israel comments.

dailyNews.title: The next head of Homeland Security needs to do a lot more to live up to Trump’s promises
dailyNews.description: New DHS leadership should signal shift toward expanded mass deportations beyond targeting only criminal aliens to live up to Trump's commitments.

dailyNews.title: How Trump and His Advisers Miscalculated Iran’s Response to War
dailyNews.description: In the lead-up to the U.S.-Israeli attack, President Trump downplayed the risks to the energy markets as a short-term concern that should not overshadow the mission to decapitate the Iranian regime.

dailyNews.title: How Trump’s War With Iran Changed the World in a Week
dailyNews.description: The conflict is reshaping travel patterns, energy dependencies, living costs, trade routes and diplomatic alliances.

dailyNews.title: Trump Casts a Shadow Over One of Mexico’s Deadliest States
dailyNews.description: President Trump wants to strike cartels inside Mexico. In Sinaloa State, a cartel stronghold, some residents said they were willing to entertain U.S. intervention.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration to Restart Global Entry Program
dailyNews.description: The program for people traveling internationally, set to come back online at 5 a.m. Wednesday, had been paused amid the shutdown of the Homeland Security Department.

dailyNews.title: A Trump-Xi Summit Nears, but China Doesn’t Know What Trump Wants
dailyNews.description: Trump’s agenda for the high-stakes meeting remains unclear to Beijing, Chinese analysts say, while American executives say they haven’t been invited along.

dailyNews.title: Clayton Fuller and Shawn Harris Advance to Runoff in Marjorie Taylor Greene’s Georgia District
dailyNews.description: Clayton Fuller will face Shawn Harris, a Democrat, in an April runoff. Mr. Fuller’s win over a flashier Republican showed the power of the president’s support.

dailyNews.title: Trump considers releasing oil from reserves to lower gas prices as Iran war roars
dailyNews.description: President Trump's energy secretary says the U.S. could tap into its oil reserves to level soaring gas prices for Americans as the Iran war continues. CBS News' Kati Weis has the latest.

dailyNews.title: Iran attacks more ships, Dubai airport, warns U.S.-linked banks are next
dailyNews.description: As the Trump administration says it's winning the war with Iran, Tehran hits 3 ships near the Strait of Hormuz, and Dubai airport, and warns banks are next.

dailyNews.title: Takeaways from Georgia special election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene
dailyNews.description: Voters in Georgia headed to the polls on Tuesday for a special election to replace former Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene. Clay Fuller, who was endorsed by President Trump, is now headed for a runoff against Democrat Shawn Harris because neither candidate received more than 50% of the vote. Chief Washington analyst Robert Costa breaks down the race.

dailyNews.title: Georgia Race to Replace Marjorie Taylor Greene Heads to Runoff
dailyNews.description: Voters in Georgia held their special election to replace former Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene with Democrat Shawn Harris and Republican Clay Fuller, who was endorsed by President Donald Trump, advancing to the runoff in the closely-watched race. NBC’s Aaron Gilchrist reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: Trump's Texas Senate endorsement race may hinge on passage of the SAVE America Act
dailyNews.description: Trump frequently brings up the SAVE America Act, which would impose stricter voting requirements. He told NBC News he is "not doing anything" until Congress passes it.
